title: Vietnamese Pho Soup
description: A delicious and comforting Vietnamese noodle soup made with beef broth, rice noodles, and your choice of beef.

ingredients.name: Beef (sliced thin)
ingredients.notes: Rare, thinly sliced beef for Pho

instructions: Begin by preparing the Pho broth: In a large stockpot, combine beef bones, onion, ginger, and 4 cups of water.
Bring the broth to a boil, then reduce heat to a simmer and cook for 1 hour.
While the broth is cooking, cook the rice noodles according to package instructions.
Slice the beef into thin strips and cook in a separate pan until rare.
To assemble the Pho, place a portion of noodles into a bowl, then add sliced beef and ladle hot broth over the top.
Garnish with cilantro, crunchy chili peppers, and serve immediately.
